## Profile

**Robert and Anne Everett Associate Professor of Digital Dairy Management and Data Analytics**  
Department of Animal Science, Cornell University  

**Adjunct Associate Professor (unpaid)**  
Department of Laboratory for Animal Nutrition and Animal Product Quality, Ghent University  

📍 King Ferry, NY (USA) · Stekene (Belgium)  
📧 miel.hostens@cornell.edu · miel.hostens@ugent.be  

### Research focus
- Precision dairy farming  
- Digital twins & federated learning  
- AI for animal health and welfare  
- Sustainable livestock systems
``

## Presentations published online

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mEnP4GJVhRM >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/ibMIYSSPNwc?si=HYCIoTuj-OCwhyWo >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/hh8AELptzH0?si=n7MAJlp_xPd9Ug2P >}}
